active_checklist: Lane 4: expose Kanboard sync outcome as a first-class read-only StatiBaker artifact and query/dashboard surface. Own report schema/persistence/query/dashboard tests.

child_heartbeat.current_step: 1. Implement `dashboard-surface` by loading latest sync report into `sb.dashboard` summary + HTML metrics, then run focused dashboard/query tests.
